General.Name: S2 Resources Ltd
General.Description: S2 Resources Ltd engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral properties in Australia and Finland. It primarily explores for gold, nickel, copper, base metals, palladium, and platinum-group elements deposits. S2 Resources Ltd was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Darch, Australia.
